title: Bakery Chefs Shop
description: Bakery Chefs Shop is a delicious and fun cooking adventure game for girls and kids. You are a talented cook who has many loyal customers in your 2D cartoon bakery. You can make orders and learn how to bake a cake in 60 levels. You can also decorate your cakes with extra items that you can unlock with gold coins. You have to serve the order well to get all 3 yellow stars and more bonus coins. Have a blast baking cakes!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
